### enable_auto_recording

>  enable_auto_recording (mcp)

*Patch MCP to automatically record all tool calls when recording is
enabled.*

Call this after creating the MCP but before running it.

### run_all_agent_tests

>  run_all_agent_tests (agent:str='claude',
>                           scenarios:Optional[List[str]]=None,
>                           save_dir:Optional[pathlib.Path]=None)

*Run all agent tests and return summary.*

Args: agent: Which agent CLI to use scenarios: List of scenarios to test
(all if None) save_dir: Directory to save session files

Returns: Summary with passed/failed counts and details

------------------------------------------------------------------------

<a
href="https://github.com/s01st/nbdev-mcp/blob/main/nbdev_mcp/tests/agent_e2e.py#L541"
target="_blank" style="float:right; font-size:smaller">source</a>

### run_agent_test

>  run_agent_test (agent:str, scenario:str,
>                      project_path:Optional[pathlib.Path]=None,
>                      timeout:int=120,
>                      save_session:Optional[pathlib.Path]=None)

*Run an automated agent test.*

Creates a test project, invokes the agent with a scenario prompt,
records tool calls, and validates against expected behavior.

Args: agent: Which agent CLI to use (“claude” or “codex”) scenario: Test
scenario name (edit_py_file, fix_lint, etc.) project_path: Optional
existing project to test (creates temp if None) timeout: Max seconds to
wait for agent save_session: Optional path to save session JSON

Returns: Dict with test results including passed, failures, stats
